metricRationale: Stage-default EV/GP deviated to EV/Revenue due to peer GM dispersion (CRWV 48%, IREN 68%, APLD 20%) making GP percentiles noisy
anchorRationale: Pre-Q4 2025 quarters reflect different business (pre-Microsoft contract, pre-2024 carve-out). Used FY26 guidance ($3.0-3.4B) + YE26 ARR target ($7-9B) instead.
capitalStructureFlags: Interest coverage 2.0x (RED — below 4x threshold; should improve as ARR ramps)

notes: Q1 2026 inflection (Microsoft $17B contract, +684% YoY revenue, GM 51%→74%, Adj EBITDA flipped positive).
